title: Leskovac, Jablanica — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Leskovac, Jablanica: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Leskovac is a city in Jablanica with a population of 60,000. A city in southern Serbia known for its textile industry, the famous Leskovac grill (roštilj), and the annual Roštiljijada festival.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
